subcodes.first_line: O ye illumined ones! For sixty years hath the assemblage of "Am I not your Lord?" been adorned through the effulgence of the Covenant [3.5s]... ...O God, my God! Lowly, humble, and tearful, I turn my face unto the Kingdom of Thy mercy and the realm of Thy singleness
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای روشندلان از پرتو عهد و پیمان شصت سال است که محفل الست آراسته گشته
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @call to action, @praise and encouragement, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar]
